faq.faq1_q: How do I book a destination?
faq.faq1_a: Browse our destinations, select your preferred option, choose your check-in date and number of guests, then click "Reserve." You can complete your booking with or without creating an account. If you choose to pay later, simply follow the payment prompt after booking.
faq.faq2_a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express). Payments are processed securely through our integrated payment gateway. Your card details are never stored on our servers.
faq.faq3_q: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
faq.faq3_a: Yes — most bookings can be cancelled or modified free of charge up to 24 hours before check-in. You can manage your bookings from the "My Bookings" section in your dashboard. For last-minute changes, please reach out to our support team directly.
faq.faq4_a: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption (SSL/TLS) to protect your data in transit. Your password is hashed and never stored in plain text. We never share your personal information with third parties without your explicit consent.
